ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flag; generic job-class card.

trivia_bullets.text: The Scholar job class in FFXIV traces its in-universe origins to the ancient city-state of Nym on the island of Vylbrand. Nymian mages bound faerie companions to share healing duties with them — allowing scholars to focus on strategy and tactics rather than pure restoration. Both the city-state and the teaching were lost to the Sixth Umbral Calamity. In a further lore tragedy, the Nymians later fell ill with 'the sickness from the sea,' their bodies rotting until they became the creatures known as Tonberries. [FFXIV Community Wiki: Scholar; FFXIV ARR: The Tragedy of Nym, via WebSearch]
sources: Dindeen.wordpress.com: FFXIV ARR — The Tragedy of Nym

trivia_bullets.text: Scholar 8-027C was spoiled via an Italian FFTCG community retailer (Gold Saucer / GamesSource.it) before the set's official release — one of several Opus VIII commons that leaked through regional prerelease events rather than the official Card of the Week slot. The card art depicts a Lalafell-style figure (small race with pointed ears, consistent with FFXIV's Lalafell player race), wearing the Scholar's signature large academic hat and holding an open book. [FFTCG boards.net: Opus VIII Card Spoilers Megathread]
sources: FFTCG.boards.net: Opus VIII Card Spoilers Megathread (finalfantasytcg.gamesource.it)

trivia_bullets.text: In FFXIV, Scholar is a healing job accessible by Arcanists at level 30 via job stone. Scholars conjure faeries — Eos (sunlight/restoration) and Selene (moonlight/invigoration) — to handle remote healing while the Scholar themselves deploys Aetherflow-based abilities and some of the game's most powerful shields. The faerie-summoning mechanic distinguishes Scholar from White Mage and Astrologian as the 'strategic shielder' of the healer trio. [FFXIV Job Guide: Scholar (na.finalfantasyxiv.com); FFXIV Community Wiki: Scholar]
sources: FFXIV Job Guide: Scholar (Square Enix official site)

related_cards.name: Summoner (FFXIV)
related_cards.note: Also unlocked from Arcanist at level 30 in FFXIV — Scholar and Summoner share the same base class
